description_long: This is an adult male figure depicted in a dynamic, combative stance, with fists raised and knees bent as if preparing to box or defend. He is dressed in a tailored, checkered suit jacket with a collared shirt and bow tie, giving him a formal, vintage appearance. The figure's head is bald, and his facial features are sharply defined, including a prominent mustache and beard. His hands and legs are untextured and appear smooth, contrasting with the detailed suit. The shoes are simple and match the untextured look of the hands and legs. The overall impression is of a well-dressed, older gentleman ready for action, reminiscent of a Victorian-era pugilist.
description: A formally dressed adult male in a checkered suit jacket and bow tie, posed in a combative stance with fists raised. The figure has a bald head, defined facial hair, and smooth, untextured limbs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facial features, raised fists, and detailed suit jacket with bow tie.
description_view_1: Left rear three-quarter view highlighting the back of the suit jacket and the figure's left arm in a defensive position.
description_view_2: Direct rear view focusing on the back of the suit jacket and the stance of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the right arm raised, and the suit's side details.
attribute_clothing_type: formal suit jacket with collared shirt and bow tie
attribute_posture: fighting stance with fists raised and knees bent
attribute_hairstyle: bald with full beard and mustache
